name: activity_session_id_contract
description: Structural contract for the T2a per-launch ActivityLog session ID. TODO(T2b): wire this to a surfaced tool response and assert the regex plus same-process stability.
expectationNote: No T2a MCP tool exposes UnrealMcp::GetLaunchSessionId(). Expected format is ^\d{8}-\d{6}-[0-9a-f]{8}$ and repeated calls in one editor process must return the same value.
